title: Create default config.yaml
description: Create .orchestrator/config.yaml with all default values organized into three top-level blocks: common (default_runner, templates_dir, agent_types, scheduler nested with lease_timeout_minutes, max_corrective_attempts, corrective_suffix, followup_suffixes, transient_block_patterns), codex (binary, skills_dir, flags), and claude (binary, skills_dir, flags, allowed_tools_default, allowed_tools_by_agent). All values must exactly match the defaults in default_config() and the current hardcoded constants. Include inline comments explaining each setting's purpose.
acceptance_criteria: All three top-level blocks (common, codex, claude) are present
load_config(repo_root) successfully parses the file and returns equivalent OrchestratorConfig to default_config()
